name: golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev
title: golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev
summary: Prometheus instrumentation library for Go applications
description:
Prometheus instrumentation library for Go applications
This is the Prometheus Go client library. It provides two main functions:
.
* The exposition library is used to export metrics to a Prometheus server or
pushgateway.
.
* The consumption library is used to process metrics exported by a Prometheus
client. (The Prometheus server is using that library.)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev because Prometheus instrumentation library for Go applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-prometheus-client-golang-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
